name: Cabbage Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup; undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook cabbage in boiling salted water until tender. Drain well.
2. In a large skillet, sauté onion in 5 tablespoons butter until tender.
3. Add soup and mix well.
4. Add cheese. Heat and stir until melted.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in cabbage, salt, and pepper.
6. Transfer to an ungreased 2-quart baking dish.
7. In a small skillet, melt remaining butter.
8. Cook and stir crumbs in butter until lightly browned.
9. Sprinkle over casserole.
10. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 20-30 minutes, or until heated through.
